title: Set up React Hook Form with Zod validation
summary: Install react-hook-form, wire up Zod resolver, handle controlled inputs (shadcn/Radix), Server Actions integration, and multi-step forms.
declaration: I will integrate React Hook Form (RHF) with Zod validation into this project. This covers the useForm hook, zodResolver for schema validation, Controller for non-native inputs (shadcn/ui), and integration with Next.js Server Actions. If you need a different resolver (Yup, Valibot) or a specific form pattern, say so before I begin.
